sentences.english: This is a very big house

sentences.tamil: நான் ஒரு தடவை சொன்னா நூறு தடவை சொன்ன மாதிரி
sentences.transliteration: nāṉ oru taḍavai soṉṉā nūṟu taḍavai soṉṉa mādiri
sentences.english: If I say it once, it's like saying it a hundred times
Need to go to the doctor
There is a moon in the sky
Need to go to the temple
Shall we go to the theater?
Need to buy a new shirt

sentences.tamil: நான் ஒரு தடவை சொன்னா, நூறு தடவை சொன்ன மாதிரி
sentences.transliteration: nāṉ oru taḍavai soṉṉā, nūṟu taḍavai soṉṉa mādiri
sentences.english: If I say it once, it's like a hundred times
My way is my own way
I won't be afraid of anyone
